encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab clears the path to the Deep Trench.
Calming the eel reveals the entrance to the Abyssal Grotto.
Soothing the ray unlocks the boss gate.

pickup.effect: Empowers necromantic strikes to sever ancient bonds.

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the Essence of the Abyss awakens the slumbering Ancient Leviathan.

output.objective: Resurrect the sunken city king by defeating the Abyssal guardians.
output.reward: Mastery over the Tides of the Damned
